// DEPLOYMENT CONFIGURATION: Choose your deployment by changing the adapters above
// Docker with embedded Ollama: Set default_adapter to 'ollama' and analyzer_adapter to 'ollama_analyzer'
// External Ollama (local): Set default_adapter to 'ollama_local' and analyzer_adapter to 'ollama_local'
// OpenAI cloud: Set default_adapter to 'openai' and analyzer_adapter to 'openai' (need OPENAI_API_KEY)
// Testing/minimal: Keep default_adapter as 'mock' and analyzer_adapter as 'mock'
